target.label: token emitter pipeline — web CSS + Tailwind preset + TUI theme

recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — six P2 ACs cover a substrate+tooling emitter story with no live test runner. AC 2 determinism + AC 6 purity have strongest substrate evidence (Task 6 two determinism smokes end-to-end, covering byte-identical round-trip + source-change propagation + revert-to-baseline). AC 1/3/4/5 substrate-verified via iter-63 dev-story execution + quality-gate bundle + spot-check attribute access. Per-AC runner-hosted coverage deferred to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing); runtime enforcement of AC 3+4 consumer integration lands via Story 1.13 source-output sync gate on every pre-commit.

Story 1.13 pre-commit gates (schema-validation + WCAG-AA contrast + source-output sync) will re-exercise AC 3 (CSS vars) + AC 4 (Tailwind preset) + AC 5 (TUI theme.py) integration at every pre-commit once they land.

Story 1.16 test-runner will unlock optional per-AC unit tests: snapshot provenance header (AC 1), byte-identical round-trip harness (AC 2), enumerate CSS var / Tailwind key / Python attribute against token leaves (AC 3/4/5), purity sandbox (AC 6).
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
